title: spiraea × pseudosalicifolia
intro: Spiraea × pseudosalicifolia, also known as hybrid spiraea or false willow spirea, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, and is a hybrid of Spiraea salicifolia and Spiraea media. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Spiraea × pseudosalicifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing coughs, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
